headline: Paul Miller to Lead Combined Emerald and Questex Business as Chief Executive Officer
summary: Visionary Events and Media Operator to Drive Organic Growth and Unlock Full Value of New, Scaled, Leading B2B Events Platform Emerald President and CEO Hervé Sedky to Serve as Senior Advisor Upon Close NEW YORK, June 24, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The holding company formed to acquire Emerald Holding, Inc.
